_description: Template for defining benchmark-ready access patterns with relative weights. All weights must sum to 1.0. Each pattern includes a name, description, the xarray operation to benchmark, and its priority weight.

patterns.name: spatial_single_timestep
patterns.description: Read a full 2D spatial field at a single timestep. Typical for map visualization and spatial analysis.
patterns._notes: Replace VARIABLE and time value with actuals. Weight reflects dominance of map-based workflows.

patterns.name: temporal_single_point
patterns.description: Read a full time series at a single spatial location. Typical for trend analysis and station validation.
patterns._notes: Replace LAT and LON with representative coordinates. Use method='nearest' for non-exact grid alignment.

patterns.name: spectral_single_point_time
patterns.description: Read across the full spectral/frequency axis at a single spatial location and timestep. Typical for spectral analysis and calibration.
patterns._notes: Only relevant for datasets with a spectral or frequency dimension. Remove if not applicable.

patterns.name: diagonal_regional_timeseries
patterns.description: Read a spatial subset across a time range, then aggregate spatially. Typical for regional climate indices and area-averaged statistics.
patterns._notes: Replace slice bounds with representative values. This pattern stresses both spatial and temporal chunk alignment.

metadata._notes: Record how patterns were identified and who approved the weights.
